title: Chalk, Alex - Lord Chancellor and Secretary of State for Justice - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Chalk left his role at the Ministry of Justice in July 2024.  Partner in Global Disputes, Jones Day Mr Chalk sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Jones Day. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in January 2025; and the appointment was taken up later  that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
